createCoinGeckoApiHandler.description:
Creates CoinGecko-specific API handlers with an instantiated CoinGecko SDK client

This is a CoinGecko-specific wrapper around the generic createRouter that:
- Maps to all CoinGecko SDK methods via dependency injection
- Provides type safety for Coingecko client
- Handles CoinGecko-specific error responses
- Includes sensible CoinGecko-specific CORS defaults

createNeynarApiHandler.description:
Creates Neynar-specific API handlers with an instantiated Neynar SDK client

This is a Neynar-specific wrapper around the generic createRouter that:
- Provides sensible Neynar-specific CORS defaults
- Maps to all 126 Neynar SDK methods via dependency injection
- Provides type safety for NeynarAPIClient
- Handles Neynar-specific error responses

createRouter.description:
Creates HTTP route handlers for API endpoints

This is the main factory function that creates Next.js API route handlers.
It takes a map of routes (already bound to their dependencies) and returns
handlers for each HTTP method that can be used directly in Next.js API routes.

HOW IT WORKS:
1. You define routes in a RouteMap (e.g., "GET /users" -> handler function)
2. This factory creates HTTP method handlers (GET, POST, etc.)
3. When a request comes in, it matches the route and calls your handler
4. Your handler receives request parameters and returns the result
5. The response is normalized and returned with proper CORS headers

MethodHandlers.description: Collection of route handlers grouped by HTTP method

RouteMap.description:
Route matcher that maps URL patterns to handlers
Pattern format: "{METHOD} {path}" where METHOD is HTTP method and path is the route

createNftMintHandler.description:
Creates a POST handler for the NFT mint route.

Handles the full mint lifecycle: mint token on-chain, generate image (or use pre-generated preview), upload metadata. Supports both mystery mint and preview-first patterns.

createNftPreviewHandler.description:
Creates a POST handler for the NFT preview route (preview-first pattern).

Generates an AI image preview and stores it server-side. Used alongside createNftMintHandler with previewStorage.

generateNftImage.description:
Generate an NFT image using AI via the Neynar API.

Server-side utility with built-in exponential backoff retries.

mintNft.description:
Mint an NFT via the Neynar API (synchronous mode).

Server-side utility that mints a token to a Farcaster user by FID. Returns transaction hash and token IDs.

uploadNftMetadata.description:
Upload NFT token metadata via the Neynar API.

Server-side utility with built-in retries. Uploads name, description, image, and attributes for a minted token.

estimateNftMintCost.description:
Estimate the total cost of minting an NFT including Neynar fees and gas.

Uses the Neynar simulate endpoint and viem gas estimation. Returns total cost in ETH.

createNftPriceHandler.description:
Creates a GET handler for the NFT price route.

Returns the mint cost in ETH for a given collection and quantity. Uses estimateNftMintCost internally.
